kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks On Login Button
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'And User Clicks On Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.And User Clicks Login Button
kw.status: No keyword with name 'And User Clicks On Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.And User Clicks Login Button

kw.name: Then User Should Be Redirected To Secure Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'And User Clicks On Login Button' found. Did you mean: keywords.And User Clicks Login Button

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: When User Enters Invalid Password Credentials
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Password Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials
kw.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Password Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials

kw.name: And User Clicks On Login Button
Then User Should See Invalid Password Error Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Password Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials

test.name: TC_003 — Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: When User Enters Invalid Username Credentials

kw.name: And User Clicks On Login Button
Then User Should See Invalid Username Error Message
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'When User Enters Invalid Username Credentials' found. Did you mean: keywords.When User Enters Valid Credentials
